sections.paragraph:
verb לרצות

to want, desire; agree; like; compensate

verb לרוץ

to run; race; rush; compete for an office or a position

verb להירצות

be accepted

verb להירצות

be paid for; requited; atoned for

verb רוצה (>>רֻצָּה)

be pleased, appeased; satisfied; be accepted; paid for, served (sentence)

verb להתרצות

be reconciled; to please; agree, consent

verb להריץ

to run, cause to run; execute (a program); rush, make run; bring quickly, despatch; make run to and fro; run a candidate

verb להרצות

to give a lecture; lecture; satisfy, please, pay off; count

verb הורצה

be lectured, told; accepted

verb הורץ

be made to run; be run, executed (a program); be brought quickly, despatched

verb לרצות (>>ריצה)

to please, humor; appease, pacify, atone

masculine noun

runner, courier, herald, outrider, outrunner; half-back (sport)

masculine noun

bishop
